titleStmt.title: SII 7.65: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 65. (A.R. No. 61 of 1900). ON THE EAST WALL OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhu vanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku 2 10-The date has been read as [2 10 2] in the Annual Report. vatu ciyamaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tūṇāṇṭārkoyil vaṭavicait tirumāḷikai kulottuṅkacoḻac campuvarāyar tirukkaṟṟaḷi
ceyvittalāl Inta vicaiyil nilam Aṭṭi nilaṅkaḷilk kalkaḷil Uḷḷūril tevatānamāna nilaṅkaḷukku kalveṭṭi tīttalāl Ikkalkaḷ Aṭittut tiruppaṇi ceyya 2 10- vatu paṭi yeṭuttu kalluveṭṭinapaṭi Inṉāyaṉāṟku rājākka
ḷ viṭṭum rājamutalikaḷ poṉniṭṭu koṇṭum tevatāṉamāka viṭṭa nilamāvatu meṭṭuvāykkālukku vaṭakku Āvārakkuṇṭil taṭi 3- ṉāl kuḻi 3 100 tta n meṟkku nattanāṟukāl kuḻi 3 100 kāy kālukku teṟku teroṭutuṟai kuḻi 4 100 2 10
tta n teṟku nālkālkuṇṭil kuḻi 8 10 tta n meṟku kuṇṭil kuḻi 3 10 tta n meṟku Erikiḻvātu kuḻi 7 10 tta nteṟku ceṉaikkuṟaikkuṇṭil kuḻi 100 6 10 teṟku melpaṭi ceṟu kuḻi 3 100 tta n teṟkku maṇali kuli 5 100 2 10 ttan
teṟku pirāṭṭiceṟu kuḻi 5 100 3 10 tta n teṟku tūmpaṭipaḷḷavātukkumaṭu kuḻi 8 10 tta n teṟku vañcipperuñceṟu kuḻi 7 100 2 10 tta n meṟku Ātittavārappaṭṭi kuḻi 4 100 2 10 Iṅkuviṭṭu vaṭakku vicaiyālayacoḻabra
hmamā rāyaṉ poṉṉiṭṭuk koṇṭu viṇṇappam ceyitu tirunaṉtāviḷakku Iraṇṭukku viṭṭa nilamāna māṅkaḻuval kuli 100 9 10 tta n vaṭakku Āṉaippaṭṭi kuḻi 10 72 tta n kiḻakkuk kalkuṇṭil kuḻi 100 3 10 5 tta n vaṭakku
toyavaṇakkuṇṭil kuli 4 10 2 tta n meṟku kuṇṭiluṭpaṭa teṅkañceṟu kuḻi 303 tta n vaṭakku melaiviḷāñceṟu kuli 2[2 10] tta n meṟku māṅkuṇṭil taṭi 2- ṉāl kuḻi 171 Iṅkuviṭṭu [paḷḷavāykkālukku
kiḻakku paḷḷattu viḷakkuppaṭṭi taṭi 2- ṉāl kuḻi 8 100 10 4 Āka kuḻi 2 1000 4 10 5 Iṅkuviṭṭu meṭṭuvāykkālukku teṟku mañcināṟukāl kuḻi 7 10 tta n teṟku kiḻai viḷāñceṟu kuḻi 32 10 tta n teṟku kku meṭṭupākkaṅ kuḻi 3 100
tta n kiḻakku vatikkarai koṭumāṭi kuli 100 3 10 5 Iṅkuviṭṭu teṟkuvatikku kiḻakku nikarilīcuramuṭaiyār tevatānam kārmukaviṉ kuli 2 100 10 4- m Iṅkuviṭṭu Āticcavārapaṭṭikku tteṟku pirakāṟan naṉtavānameṭu kuḻi 5 100 2 10 tta n teṟku toṭṭaṅ kuḻi 2 10
tta n teṟku Ammaiappaṉ tirunan=ta vanam kuḻi 3 100 tta n tteṟku nan=ta vanakkuṇṭil kuḻi 100 3 10 5 tta n kiḻakku taṭi 1 viṭṭu viḷakkuppaṭṭiyāna maṇalikkālil kalicca taṭi 3- ṉāl kuḻi 5 100 8 10 tta n kiḻakku Ilavañceṟu kuḻi 2 100 4 10 tta n vaṭakku paṭṭiṉakuṇṭil kuḻi 2 100 2 10 tta n meṟku
ceralankuṇṭil Uṭpaṭa kuḻi 3 100 tta n kālukku kiḻakku kaṇavatikuṇṭil kuḻi 100 5 10 5 Iṅkuviṭṭu kiḻaivatikku kiḻakku paḷḷacceṟut taṭi 2- ṉāl kuḻi 1000 100 2 10 vatikku melvaṇṇakkaṉkaḻuval kuḻi 2 100 9 10 tta n kiḻakku muṭaṅku kuḻi 3 100 3 10 tta n kiḻakku moṭikuṇṭil kuḻi 100 8 10 tta n kiḻakku
peruṅkuṭiceṟu kuḻi 4 100 4 10 ttan vaṭa pāṭuvāṉkuṇṭil kuḻi 100 2 10 Iṅkuviṭṭu kuḻi meltalai naṭuvunilaikallu niṟkum Iluppaikaḻuval kuli 4 100 Iṅkuviṭṭu meṟkukālukku teṟku nīroṭukaḻuval kuli 3 100 2 10 tta n meṟkukalkuṇṭil kuḻi 100 7 10 Itu
panmāheśvara rakṣaiḥ �This inscription employs the symbols kuḻi, teṟku, tta n, kiḻakku, meṟku and vaṭakku, for kuḻi, teṟku, idan, kīḻ, mēl and vaḍa.
Digital edition of SII 7.65 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
